- **Language**: unknown

## Context

Run the full daily status workflow end-to-end: Phase 1 (gather via status_gatherer.py), Phase 2 (pre-analyst + LLM report), Phase 3 (pre-critic + LLM review). This is the first end-to-end test of the mechanized v2.0.0 workflow.

**Artifact:** status-raw.md

**Watchlist tickers queried:** 10 tickers (ACHR, AR, BBAI, CLF, RKT, NNE, SEDG, TMC, VALE, UAMY)

handoffs.report:
**Artifact:** status-report.md
**Active positions reported:** 8 (APLD, NU, IONQ, USAR, INTC, SMCI, LUNR, STIM)
**Fill alerts:** None
**Actionable items:** 2 items flagged

**Key narratives added:**
- **APLD**: Nvidia stake exit (8-day -24% sell-off) + neocloud contagion from CoreWeave, EXTREME short squeeze risk 75/100 (+13.6% MoM short buildup)
- **NU**: Earnings gate cleared — Q4 beat on revenue/EPS but -6.3% AH drop; Reserve 1 at $14.88 only 1.2% away, activation recommended
- **IONQ**: Massive Q4 beat (+429% YoY revenue, +19% today) — recovery gap narrowed to 8.7%, time stop concern lifted
- **USAR**: $3.1B capital raise + US govt 10% stake intact; short interest spiked +139.6% MoM (HIGH risk)
- **INTC**: Near breakeven, SambaNova AI inference partnership, NVDA holds 214M INTC shares; LOW short risk, decreasing
- **SMCI**: Bullish news 77% positive; Nvidia-backed CNode-X launch; Jim Cramer "no-fly zone" (contrarian signal)
- **LUNR**: $175M dilutive raise closes tomorrow (Feb 27); STRONG institutional accumulation (D.E. Shaw +3258%, Point72 +851%)
- **STIM**: EXTREME squeeze risk 80/100, DTC 6.48, Madryn rebuilt full position; earnings March 17 (20 days — approaching gate)
- **Watchlist**: TMC closest to B1 (-5.2%); CIFR/CLSK/SOUN price data unavailable — broker verification flagged
handoffs.review:
**Artifact:** status-review.md
**Verdict:** PASS
**Checks passed:** 6/6 mechanical (all clean) + qualitative PASS
**Issues found:** 0 critical, 3 minor

**Minor observations:**
1. IONQ — Morgan Stanley PT ($37) is 9.6% below current price ($40.88); the report mentions it but doesn't flag the bearish implication for exit level planning
2. LUNR — $175M offering settlement (Feb 27) is noted in narrative but missing from Actionable Items as a Monday open monitoring trigger
3. STIM — TRICARE West news (Nov 2025) presented without timestamp qualifier, slightly overstating recency

**Strengths:** No fabricated data across 8 positions. Earnings gate transitions (NU cleared, IONQ catalyst, LUNR/STIM approaching) handled accurately. Actionable item #1 (NU activation) is concrete and broker-ready. Honest handling of missing institutional data and CIFR/CLSK/SOUN price unavailability.

Status review complete.
